_comment: Reach a loopback-only, UNPUBLISHED Caddy admin via the ssh-exec transport — no port published, no tunnel. The admin call runs as a nested-exec curl on the far end (ssh -> pct exec -> docker exec -> sh), hitting the admin on its own container-localhost. This is the read shape proven against the maintainer's home edge; for writes the same edge participates in a chain (see settings-chain-write.json). An edge with just admin_url and no `transport` block behaves exactly as before (direct HTTP).
